title: Audit Associate
description: Deloitte is the largest professional services network in the world, delivering audit, consulting, tax, and advisory services to many of the most admired brands and public-sector organizations across the globe. At Deloitte, our purpose is to make an impact that matters — for our clients, our people, and our communities. As an Audit Associate in our Chicago practice, you will serve Fortune 500 clients and high-growth enterprises, executing financial statement audits and assurance engagements that uphold the integrity of the capital markets. You will work within collaborative engagement teams, developing deep technical expertise while building the client relationships that define a successful career in professional services. This role offers a structured path for advancement within the Big 4, with significant investment in your professional growth from day one.
responsibilities: Execute audit procedures over key financial statement areas including revenue recognition, inventory, and accounts receivable in accordance with PCAOB and AICPA standards
Evaluate the design and operating effectiveness of internal controls, documenting findings and communicating deficiencies to engagement leadership
Prepare and review audit workpapers, ensuring thorough documentation that meets Deloitte's methodology standards and regulatory requirements
Leverage data analytics tools and techniques to identify anomalies, assess risk, and enhance the quality and efficiency of audit engagements
Build and maintain productive working relationships with client personnel, serving as a reliable point of contact for day-to-day audit inquiries

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field from an accredited institution; Master's in Accounting preferred

benefits: Comprehensive health insurance including medical, dental, and vision coverage
CPA exam preparation support and pass bonus
Flexible work arrangements including hybrid scheduling and summer Fridays
Wellness programs including mental health resources, fitness reimbursements, and employee assistance programs
